THE APR-27-2016 OBJECTION HEARING IS RESCHEDULED TO MAY-04-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610.

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND MONETARY SANCTION IS GRANTED. WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE. PLAINTIFF SHALL ALSO PAY A MONETARY SANCTION OF $860. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NAOMI GRAY; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Larisa K. Raymundo, of Gilsleider, McMahon & Molinelli, Tel. 925.446.3040, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS TOM Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Monetary Sanction is GRANTED. Within 10 days of notice of entry of the order, Plaintiff shall provide verified responses without objection to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Special Interrogatories, Set One. Plaintiff shall also pay a monetary sanction of $860. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Larisa K. Raymundo, of Gilsleider, McMahon & Molinelli, Tel. 925.446.3040, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS TOM Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Monetary Sanction is GRANTED. Within 10 days of notice of entry of the order, Plaintiff shall respond without objection to Defendant's Request for Production of Documents, Set One. Plaintiff shall also pay a monetary sanction of $860. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
